label: Bodley Mansion
summary: Whole Bodley Mansion interior scene, packed as raw CHR, layout, metatile, palette, and promoted actor data for WebGL rendering.

condition.playerFacing: Walk beneath these ceiling rocks to trigger the falling-rock trap.

white-crystal.label: White Crystal
white-crystal.manualText: The White Crystal offers a weakened source of magic power.
white-crystal.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Items, page 11.

blue-crystal.label: Blue Crystal
blue-crystal.manualText: Offers stronger magical powers than the White Crystal.
blue-crystal.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Items, page 11.

red-crystal.label: Red Crystal
red-crystal.manualText: You must have the Red Crystal before you enter Dracula's Castle.
red-crystal.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Items, page 11.

oak-stake.label: The Oak Stake
oak-stake.manualText: You'll need the Oak Stake to collect Dracula's corpse at the mansions.
oak-stake.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Weapons, page 10.

dagger.label: The Dagger
dagger.manualText: The dagger can be thrown to kill distant enemy creatures.
dagger.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Weapons, page 10.

thorn-whip.label: Thorn Whip
thorn-whip.manualText: The Thorn Whip is stronger than the Leather Whip.
thorn-whip.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Weapons, page 10.

chain-whip.label: The Chain Whip
chain-whip.manualText: The Chain Whip is stronger than the Thorn Whip.
chain-whip.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Weapons, page 10.

morning-star.label: Morning Star
morning-star.manualText: The Morning Star is longer than the Chain Whip.
morning-star.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Weapons, page 10.

flame-whip.label: The Flame Whip
flame-whip.manualText: The Flame Whip. Magic changes the Morning Star into the Flame Whip and gives it mysterious powers.
flame-whip.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Weapons, page 10.

holy-water.label: Holy Water
holy-water.manualText: Holy Water disintegrates walls and floors which conceal weapons and items.
holy-water.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Items, page 11.

sacred-flame.label: Sacred Flame
sacred-flame.manualText: The flame weakens the creatures' evil powers.
sacred-flame.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Weapons, page 10.

diamond.label: Diamond
diamond.manualText: Toss it and see what happens.
diamond.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Items, page 11.

silk-bag.label: Silk Bag
silk-bag.manualText: If you have the Silk Bag you can carry a larger supply of medicinal herbs.
silk-bag.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Items, page 11.

silver-knife.label: Silver Knife
silver-knife.manualText: The Silver Knife can be thrown farther than the dagger.
silver-knife.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Weapons, page 10.

golden-knife.label: The Gold Knife
golden-knife.manualText: This is your strongest knife, and it has a mysterious power.
golden-knife.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Weapons, page 10.

dracula-rib.label: Dracula's Rib
dracula-rib.manualText: The rib bone will make the ordinary hero feel like a spineless coward.
dracula-rib.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Count Dracula's Missing Pieces, page 9.

dracula-heart.label: Dracula's Heart
dracula-heart.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Count Dracula's Missing Pieces, page 9.

dracula-eyeball.label: Dracula's Eyeball
dracula-eyeball.manualText: When it comes to the most frightening piece, the eyes have it.
dracula-eyeball.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Count Dracula's Missing Pieces, page 9.

magic-cross.label: The Cross
magic-cross.manualText: You must have the Cross to seal Dracula's fate.
magic-cross.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Items, page 11.

dracula-nail.label: Dracula's Nail
dracula-nail.manualText: The nail is the symbol of evil power.
dracula-nail.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Count Dracula's Missing Pieces, page 9.

dracula-ring.label: Dracula's Ring
dracula-ring.manualText: It's been in the Count's family for hundreds of years. Then again, the Count's also been in his family for hundreds of years.
dracula-ring.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Count Dracula's Missing Pieces, page 9.

garlic.label: Garlic
garlic.manualText: Place the Garlic in front of enemies, and it will weaken them significantly.
garlic.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Items, page 11.

laurels.label: Laurels
laurels.manualText: Laurel helps make you invincible against enemy attacks. You can purchase Laurel from town merchants.
laurels.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Items, page 11.

staticPreview.reason: The ROM zigzag bat moves while flapping. Static guide placement offsets the second selector frame so the body does not appear to snap upward inside a fixed map marker.

guideDialog.text:
Simon Belmont
----------
On a quest to uncover Count Dracula's five missing body parts.

itemOffer.priceSource: ROM sale table at file offset $1ED37: $59 $00 $50.
itemOffer.manualText: You'll need the Oak Stake to collect Dracula's corpse at the mansions.
itemOffer.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Magic Weapons, page 10.

actors.label: Hidden clue book
actors.text: the curse has killed the laurel tree.

the curse
has killed
the laurel
tree.
textEvidence.text: the curse has killed the laurel tree.

secret.action: Dracula's Eyeball lets Simon see this hidden item before uncovering it.
secret.reveal: The clue book appears after the marked blocks are opened. Dracula's Eyeball makes the hidden item visible before the blocks are broken.

itemReward.manualText: The nail is the symbol of evil power.
itemReward.manualSource: Nintendo Castlevania II: Simon's Quest instruction manual, Count Dracula's Missing Pieces, page 9.

secret.action: Use an Oak Stake here to reveal Dracula's Nail.
